instructions: This directory contains integrations with external tools and operating-system surfaces. Favor comments about correctness, cleanup, and untrusted inputs over style-only feedback.

rules.rule: Plugin implementations must match their declared slot, import contracts from @composio/ao-core, and keep the manifest/create/default export shape consistent with PluginModule<T>.

Treat CLI output, API payloads, metadata files, and OS integration responses as untrusted. Parse defensively, validate presence and types before use, and fail with actionable errors when assumptions break.
Destroy and teardown paths must release tmux sessions, temp files, symlinks, streams, listeners, child processes, and partial setup artifacts even after errors or timeouts.
